title: B4's Pre-Damage Indicator
description:
The first pre-damage indicator to Minecraft!
Works pretty much everywhere and is fully client side.
body:
This is a mod who adds a indicator who shows how much damage the player will deal if he attacks.
When the player is looking at an living entity, an indicator will show up and will indicate the amount of damage the player will deal.
This mod is fully client-side, so you can use it on servers and they don't need to have the mod.
The mod works with every vanilla weapon, even when the weapon is in the off-hand !
The mod will also show if the damage is enough to kill the targeted entity or pop their totem of undying if the target have one in one of their hands.

This mod allows the player using it to be more aware of their attacks, the power of their weapons and the gear of the target.

NOTICE: I am not responsible for any potential punishment you can get from a server.
Always ask permission to servers owners before using this mod in multiplayer!
